summary_zh: 在真实水下环境中，语义分割和目标检测等下游图像识别任务经常面临模糊和颜色不一致等问题带来的挑战。水下图像增强（UIE）作为一种有前景的预处理方法应运而生，旨在提高水下图像中目标的可识别性。然而，现有的大多数UIE方法主要侧重于为人类视觉感知增强图像，经常无法重建对于特定任务识别至关重要的高频细节。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种下游任务驱动的水下图像增强（DTI-UIE）框架，该框架利用人类视觉感知模型来有效地为水下视觉任务增强图像。具体来说，我们设计了一个高效的双分支网络，带有任务感知注意力模块，用于特征融合。该网络受益于多阶段训练框架和任务驱动的感知损失。此外，受到人类感知的启发，我们使用各种特定任务网络自动构建了一个任务驱动的UIE数据集（TI-UIED）。实验结果表明，DTI-UIE通过生成有利于语义分割、目标检测和实例分割等下游任务的预处理图像，显著提高了任务性能。代码已公开在https://github.com/oucailab/DTIUIE。

title: Action-Guided Attention for Video Action Anticipation
summary: Anticipating future actions in videos is challenging, as the observed frames provide only evidence of past activities, requiring the inference of latent intentions to predict upcoming actions. Existing transformer-based approaches, which rely on dot-product attention over pixel representations, often lack the high-level semantics necessary to model video sequences for effective action anticipation. As a result, these methods tend to overfit to explicit visual cues present in the past frames, limiting their ability to capture underlying intentions and degrading generalization to unseen samples. To address this, we propose Action-Guided Attention (AGA), an attention mechanism that explicitly leverages predicted action sequences as queries and keys to guide sequence modeling. Our approach fosters the attention module to emphasize relevant moments from the past based on the upcoming activity and combine this information with the current frame embedding via a dedicated gating function. The design of AGA enables post-training analysis of the knowledge discovered from the training set. Experiments on the widely adopted EPIC-Kitchens-100 benchmark demonstrate that AGA generalizes well from validation to unseen test sets. Post-training analysis can further examine the action dependencies captured by the model and the counterfactual evidence it has internalized, offering transparent and interpretable insights into its anticipative predictions.
tldr: The paper introduces Action-Guided Attention (AGA), a novel attention mechanism for video action anticipation that uses predicted action sequences to guide sequence modeling, improving generalization and interpretability compared to existing transformer-based methods.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新的视频行为预测注意力机制Action-Guided Attention (AGA)，它使用预测的行为序列来指导序列建模，与现有的基于Transformer的方法相比，提高了泛化能力和可解释性。
summary_zh: 在视频中预测未来的动作极具挑战性，因为观察到的帧仅提供过去活动的信息，需要推断潜在意图才能预测即将发生的动作。现有的基于Transformer的方法依赖于像素表示上的点积注意力机制，但通常缺乏对视频序列进行建模以有效预测动作所需的高级语义信息。因此，这些方法倾向于过度拟合过去帧中存在的显式视觉线索，从而限制了它们捕捉潜在意图的能力，并降低了对未见样本的泛化能力。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种动作引导注意力（AGA）机制，该机制明确地利用预测的动作序列作为查询和键来指导序列建模。我们的方法促进了注意力模块，使其能够基于即将发生的活动来强调过去的相关时刻，并通过专门的门控函数将此信息与当前帧嵌入相结合。AGA的设计使得能够在训练后分析从训练集中发现的知识。在广泛使用的EPIC-Kitchens-100基准上的实验表明，AGA能够很好地从验证集泛化到未见的测试集。训练后的分析可以进一步检验模型捕获的动作依赖关系以及其内化的反事实证据，从而为预测性预测提供透明且可解释的见解。

title: UltraStar: Semantic-Aware Star Graph Modeling for Echocardiography Navigation
summary: Echocardiography is critical for diagnosing cardiovascular diseases, yet the shortage of skilled sonographers hinders timely patient care, due to high operational difficulties. Consequently, research on automated probe navigation has significant clinical potential. To achieve robust navigation, it is essential to leverage historical scanning information, mimicking how experts rely on past feedback to adjust subsequent maneuvers. Practical scanning data collected from sonographers typically consists of noisy trajectories inherently generated through trial-and-error exploration. However, existing methods typically model this history as a sequential chain, forcing models to overfit these noisy paths, leading to performance degradation on long sequences. In this paper, we propose UltraStar, which reformulates probe navigation from path regression to anchor-based global localization. By establishing a Star Graph, UltraStar treats historical keyframes as spatial anchors connected directly to the current view, explicitly modeling geometric constraints for precise positioning. We further enhance the Star Graph with a semantic-aware sampling strategy that actively selects the representative landmarks from massive history logs, reducing redundancy for accurate anchoring. Extensive experiments on a dataset with over 1.31 million samples demonstrate that UltraStar outperforms baselines and scales better with longer input lengths, revealing a more effective topology for history modeling under noisy exploration.
tldr: The paper introduces UltraStar, a semantic-aware star graph modeling approach for echocardiography navigation, addressing the challenge of noisy historical data by using keyframes as spatial anchors for robust probe localization.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了UltraStar，一种用于超声心动图导航的语义感知星图建模方法，通过使用关键帧作为空间锚点，解决了噪声历史数据的问题，从而实现稳健的探头定位。
summary_zh: 超声心动图对于诊断心血管疾病至关重要，但由于操作难度高，熟练超声医师的短缺阻碍了及时的患者护理。因此，自动化探头导航的研究具有重要的临床潜力。为了实现稳健的导航，利用历史扫描信息至关重要，这模仿了专家如何依靠过去的反馈来调整后续操作。从超声医师处收集的实际扫描数据通常包含噪声轨迹，这些轨迹本质上是通过试错探索产生的。然而，现有方法通常将此历史记录建模为序列链，迫使模型过度拟合这些噪声路径，从而导致长序列上的性能下降。在本文中，我们提出了UltraStar，它将探头导航从路径回归重新定义为基于锚点的全局定位。通过建立星图，UltraStar将历史关键帧视为直接连接到当前视图的空间锚点，显式地对几何约束进行建模以实现精确定位。我们进一步使用一种语义感知采样策略来增强星图，该策略主动地从大量历史日志中选择具有代表性的地标，从而减少冗余以实现准确的锚定。在一个包含超过131万个样本的数据集上进行的大量实验表明，UltraStar的性能优于基线，并且在更长的输入长度下能够更好地扩展，这揭示了一种在噪声探索下进行历史建模的更有效的拓扑结构。

title: Accelerating PDE Surrogates via RL-Guided Mesh Optimization
summary: Deep surrogate models for parametric partial differential equations (PDEs) can deliver high-fidelity approximations but remain prohibitively data-hungry: training often requires thousands of fine-grid simulations, each incurring substantial computational cost. To address this challenge, we introduce RLMesh, an end-to-end framework for efficient surrogate training under limited simulation budget. The key idea is to use reinforcement learning (RL) to adaptively allocate mesh grid points non-uniformly within each simulation domain, focusing numerical resolution in regions most critical for accurate PDE solutions. A lightweight proxy model further accelerates RL training by providing efficient reward estimates without full surrogate retraining. Experiments on PDE benchmarks demonstrate that RLMesh achieves competitive accuracy to baselines but with substantially fewer simulation queries. These results show that solver-level spatial adaptivity can dramatically improve the efficiency of surrogate training pipelines, enabling practical deployment of learning-based PDE surrogates across a wide range of problems.
tldr: The paper introduces RLMesh, an RL-guided framework for adaptive mesh refinement in PDE surrogate training, significantly reducing the number of required simulations while maintaining competitive accuracy.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了RLMesh，一个通过强化学习指导的自适应网格细化框架，用于PDE代理模型的训练，显著减少了所需的模拟次数，同时保持了具有竞争力的准确性。
summary_zh: 用于参数偏微分方程（PDEs）的深度代理模型可以提供高保真的近似，但仍然存在数据需求过高的问题：训练通常需要数千次精细网格模拟，每次都会产生大量的计算成本。为了解决这一挑战，我们引入了RLMesh，这是一个在有限模拟预算下进行高效代理训练的端到端框架。其关键思想是使用强化学习（RL）在每个模拟域内非均匀地自适应分配网格点，将数值分辨率集中在对精确PDE解至关重要的区域。一个轻量级的代理模型通过提供高效的奖励估计，而无需完全重新训练代理模型，进一步加速了RL训练。在PDE基准测试上的实验表明，RLMesh在精度上与基线方法具有竞争力，但所需的模拟查询次数却大大减少。这些结果表明，求解器级别的空间自适应可以显著提高代理训练管道的效率，从而能够在广泛的问题中实际部署基于学习的PDE代理。

title: Event-Only Drone Trajectory Forecasting with RPM-Modulated Kalman Filtering
summary: Event cameras provide high-temporal-resolution visual sensing that is well suited for observing fast-moving aerial objects; however, their use for drone trajectory prediction remains limited. This work introduces an event-only drone forecasting method that exploits propeller-induced motion cues. Propeller rotational speed are extracted directly from raw event data and fused within an RPM-aware Kalman filtering framework. Evaluations on the FRED dataset show that the proposed method outperforms learning-based approaches and vanilla kalman filter in terms of average distance error and final distance error at 0.4s and 0.8s forecasting horizons. The results demonstrate robust and accurate short- and medium-horizon trajectory forecasting without reliance on RGB imagery or training data.
tldr: This paper proposes an event-camera-based drone trajectory forecasting method that leverages propeller rotational speed extracted from event data, outperforming learning-based methods and vanilla Kalman filters on the FRED dataset. It achieves robust trajectory forecasting without RGB data or training.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于事件相机的无人机轨迹预测方法，该方法利用从事件数据中提取的螺旋桨转速，在FRED数据集上优于基于学习的方法和普通的卡尔曼滤波器。 它实现了稳健的轨迹预测，无需RGB数据或训练。
summary_zh: 事件相机提供高时间分辨率的视觉感知，非常适合观测快速移动的空中物体；然而，它们在无人机轨迹预测方面的应用仍然有限。本研究提出了一种仅使用事件信息的无人机预测方法，该方法利用螺旋桨引起的运动线索。螺旋桨的转速直接从原始事件数据中提取，并在一个感知 RPM 的卡尔曼滤波框架中进行融合。在 FRED 数据集上的评估表明，该方法在 0.4 秒和 0.8 秒的预测范围内，其平均距离误差和最终距离误差均优于基于学习的方法和普通卡尔曼滤波器。结果表明，无需依赖 RGB 图像或训练数据，即可实现稳健且精确的短中期轨迹预测。

title: From Transportation to Manipulation: Transforming Magnetic Levitation to Magnetic Robotics
summary: Magnetic Levitation (MagLev) systems fundamentally increase the flexibility of in-machine material flow in industrial automation. Therefore, these systems enable dynamic throughput optimization, which is especially beneficial for high-mix low-volume manufacturing. Until now, MagLev installations have been used primarily for in-machine transport, while their potential for manipulation is largely unexplored. This paper introduces the 6D-Platform MagBot, a low-cost six degrees of freedom parallel kinematic that couples two movers into a composite robotic platform. Experiments show that the 6D-Platform MagBot achieves sub-millimeter positioning accuracy and supports fully autonomous pick up and drop off via a docking station, allowing rapid and repeatable reconfiguration of the machine. Relative to a single mover, the proposed platform substantially expands the reachable workspace, payload, and functional dexterity. By unifying transportation and manipulation, this work advances Magnetic Levitation towards Magnetic Robotics, enabling manufacturing solutions that are more agile, efficient, and adaptable.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel 6D-Platform MagBot using magnetic levitation for enhanced in-machine manipulation, achieving sub-millimeter accuracy for pick-and-place tasks and increased workspace/dexterity compared to single movers.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种新型的6D平台磁悬浮机器人(MagBot)，用于增强机内操作，实现了亚毫米级的拾取放置精度，并与单个移动器相比，增加了工作空间和灵活性。
summary_zh: 磁悬浮（MagLev）系统从根本上提高了工业自动化中机内物料流动的灵活性。因此，这些系统能够实现动态吞吐量优化，这对于多品种小批量生产尤其有利。到目前为止，磁悬浮装置主要用于机内运输，而其在操作方面的潜力在很大程度上尚未被探索。本文介绍了一种低成本的六自由度并联运动机构6D平台磁机器人（MagBot），它将两个移动体耦合到一个复合机器人平台上。实验表明，该6D平台磁机器人实现了亚毫米级的定位精度，并通过一个对接站支持完全自主的取放操作，从而实现机器的快速和可重复配置。相对于单个移动体，所提出的平台显著扩大了可达工作空间、有效载荷和功能灵巧性。通过统一运输和操作，这项工作将磁悬浮技术发展为磁性机器人技术，从而实现更敏捷、高效和适应性强的制造解决方案。

title: A Safety-Aware Shared Autonomy Framework with BarrierIK Using Control Barrier Functions
summary: Shared autonomy blends operator intent with autonomous assistance. In cluttered environments, linear blending can produce unsafe commands even when each source is individually collision-free. Many existing approaches model obstacle avoidance through potentials or cost terms, which only enforce safety as a soft constraint. In contrast, safety-critical control requires hard guarantees. We investigate the use of control barrier functions (CBFs) at the inverse kinematics (IK) layer of shared autonomy, targeting post-blend safety while preserving task performance. Our approach is evaluated in simulation on representative cluttered environments and in a VR teleoperation study comparing pure teleoperation with shared autonomy. Across conditions, employing CBFs at the IK layer reduces violation time and increases minimum clearance while maintaining task performance. In the user study, participants reported higher perceived safety and trust, lower interference, and an overall preference for shared autonomy with our safety filter. Additional materials available at https://berkguler.github.io/barrierik.
tldr: This paper presents a shared autonomy framework that uses Control Barrier Functions (CBFs) at the inverse kinematics (IK) layer to ensure safety in cluttered environments. The approach is shown to reduce collisions and improve user experience compared to pure teleoperation and shared autonomy without CBFs.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种共享自主框架，该框架在逆运动学 (IK) 层使用控制障碍函数 (CBF) 来确保在拥挤环境中的安全性。研究表明，与纯遥操作和没有 CBF 的共享自主相比，该方法可以减少碰撞并改善用户体验。
summary_zh: 共享自主融合了操作员意图和自主辅助。在杂乱环境中，线性混合可能会产生不安全的指令，即使每个来源单独而言都是无碰撞的。许多现有方法通过势函数或代价项来建模避障，但这只将安全性作为一种软约束来执行。相比之下，安全攸关控制需要硬性保证。我们研究了在共享自主的逆运动学（IK）层中使用控制屏障函数（CBF），旨在实现后混合的安全性，同时保持任务性能。我们的方法在具有代表性的杂乱环境的仿真中以及虚拟现实遥操作研究中进行了评估，该研究比较了纯遥操作与共享自主。在各种条件下，在 IK 层采用 CBF 可以减少违规时间并增加最小间隙，同时保持任务性能。在用户研究中，参与者报告了更高的感知安全性和信任度、更低的干扰，以及对带有我们安全滤波器的共享自主的整体偏好。更多材料请访问 https://berkguler.github.io/barrierik。

title: (hu)Man vs. Machine: In the Future of Motorsport, can Autonomous Vehicles Compete?
summary: Motorsport has historically driven technological innovation in the automotive industry. Autonomous racing provides a proving ground to push the limits of performance of autonomous vehicle (AV) systems. In principle, AVs could be at least as fast, if not faster, than humans. However, human driven racing provides broader audience appeal thus far, and is more strategically challenging. Both provide opportunities to push each other even further technologically, yet competitions remain separate. This paper evaluates whether the future of motorsport could encompass joint competition between humans and AVs. Analysis of the current state of the art, as well as recent competition outcomes, shows that while technical performance has reached comparable levels, there are substantial challenges in racecraft, strategy and safety that need to be overcome. Outstanding issues involved in mixed human-AI racing, ranging from an initial assessment of critical factors such as system-level latencies, to effective planning and risk guarantees are explored. The crucial non-technical aspect of audience engagement and appeal regarding the changing character of motorsport is addressed. In the wider context of motorsport and AVs, this work outlines a proposed agenda for future research to 'keep pushing the possible', in the true spirit of motorsport.
tldr: This paper explores the feasibility and challenges of integrating autonomous vehicles into existing human-driven motorsport, analyzing technical aspects like latency and strategy, as well as non-technical aspects like audience engagement, and proposes a research agenda for future development.
tldr_zh: 本文探讨了将自动驾驶汽车整合到现有的人工驾驶赛车运动中的可行性和挑战，分析了延迟和策略等技术方面，以及观众参与等非技术方面，并提出了未来发展的研究议程。
summary_zh: 赛车运动历来推动着汽车工业的技术创新。 自动驾驶赛车为突破自动驾驶汽车（AV）系统性能的极限提供了一个试验场。 原则上，自动驾驶汽车至少可以和人类一样快，甚至更快。 然而，到目前为止，人类驾驶的赛车更能吸引观众，并且在战略上更具挑战性。 这两者都提供了机会来进一步推动彼此的技术发展，但比赛仍然是分开的。 本文评估了赛车运动的未来是否可以包含人类和自动驾驶汽车之间的联合竞争。 对当前技术水平以及近期比赛结果的分析表明，尽管技术性能已达到相当水平，但在比赛技巧、战略和安全方面仍存在重大挑战需要克服。 本文探讨了混合人机协同赛车中存在的突出问题，范围从对系统级延迟等关键因素的初步评估，到有效的规划和风险保证。 此外，还探讨了与赛车运动性质的改变相关的、至关重要的非技术层面，即观众参与度和吸引力。 在赛车运动和自动驾驶汽车的更广泛背景下，这项工作概述了一个未来研究的拟议议程，以“不断突破可能”，秉承赛车运动的真正精神。

title: Bimanual XR Specification of Relative and Absolute Assembly Hierarchies for Teleoperation
summary: We present a bimanual XR interaction approach for specifying remote assembly tasks as hierarchies of relative and absolute object constraints that specify high-level teleoperation goals for robots. Grabbing one object in each hand creates a constraint group (visualized as a hull) and groups can be nested into hierarchies. Each group can be relative (with a robot-specifiable 6DoF pose) or absolute (with an author-specified fixed 6DoF pose) in relation to its parent. A relative group specifies a subassembly that can be constructed at a location chosen by the robot software for efficiency rather than mandated by the user.
tldr: This paper introduces a bimanual XR interface for specifying remote assembly tasks as hierarchies of relative and absolute object constraints, providing robots with high-level goals for teleoperation.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种双手动XR界面，用于将远程装配任务指定为相对和绝对对象约束的层次结构，为机器人提供远程操作的高级目标。
summary_zh: 我们提出了一种双手动XR交互方法，用于将远程装配任务指定为相对和绝对对象约束的层级结构，从而为机器人指定高级远程操作目标。用双手抓取每个对象会创建一个约束组（可视化为外壳），并且可以将组嵌套到层级结构中。每个组可以是相对于其父级的相对组（具有机器人可指定的6自由度姿态）或绝对组（具有作者指定的固定6自由度姿态）。相对组指定一个子装配，该子装配可以在机器人软件选择的位置进行构建以提高效率，而不是由用户强制规定。

title: D-GVIO: A Buffer-Driven and Efficient Decentralized GNSS-Visual-Inertial State Estimator for Multi-Agent Systems
summary: Cooperative localization is essential for swarm applications like collaborative exploration and search-and-rescue missions. However, maintaining real-time capability, robustness, and computational efficiency on resource-constrained platforms presents significant challenges. To address these challenges, we propose D-GVIO, a buffer-driven and fully decentralized GNSS-Visual-Inertial Odometry (GVIO) framework that leverages a novel buffering strategy to support efficient and robust distributed state estimation. The proposed framework is characterized by four core mechanisms. Firstly, through covariance segmentation, covariance intersection and buffering strategy, we modularize propagation and update steps in distributed state estimation, significantly reducing computational and communication burdens. Secondly, the left-invariant extended Kalman filter (L-IEKF) is adopted for information fusion, which exhibits superior state estimation performance over the traditional extended Kalman filter (EKF) since its state transition matrix is independent of the system state. Thirdly, a buffer-based re-propagation strategy is employed to handle delayed measurements efficiently and accurately by leveraging the L-IEKF, eliminating the need for costly re-computation. Finally, an adaptive buffer-driven outlier detection method is proposed to dynamically cull GNSS outliers, enhancing robustness in GNSS-challenged environments.
tldr: The paper presents D-GVIO, a decentralized GNSS-Visual-Inertial Odometry framework for multi-agent systems using a novel buffer-driven approach to achieve real-time, robust, and computationally efficient state estimation on resource-constrained platforms.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了D-GVIO，一种用于多智能体系统的去中心化GNSS-视觉-惯性里程计框架，使用一种新型的缓冲驱动方法，以在资源受限的平台上实现实时、稳健和计算高效的状态估计。
summary_zh: 合作定位对于诸如协同探索和搜索救援任务等集群应用至关重要。然而，在资源受限的平台上保持实时性、稳健性和计算效率带来了巨大的挑战。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种基于缓冲的完全去中心化GNSS-视觉-惯性里程计（D-GVIO）框架，该框架利用一种新颖的缓冲策略来支持高效且稳健的分布式状态估计。所提出的框架具有四个核心机制。首先，通过协方差分割、协方差交叉和缓冲策略，我们对分布式状态估计中的传播和更新步骤进行模块化，显著降低了计算和通信负担。其次，采用左不变扩展卡尔曼滤波器（L-IEKF）进行信息融合，由于其状态转移矩阵独立于系统状态，因此相较于传统的扩展卡尔曼滤波器（EKF）展现出更优越的状态估计性能。第三，采用基于缓冲的重传播策略，通过利用L-IEKF高效而精确地处理延迟测量，从而消除了对高成本的重新计算的需求。最后，提出了一种自适应的基于缓冲的异常值检测方法，以动态剔除GNSS异常值，从而增强了在GNSS受限环境中的稳健性。

title: "When to Hand Off, When to Work Together": Expanding Human-Agent Co-Creative Collaboration through Concurrent Interaction
summary: Human collaborators coordinate dynamically through process visibility and workspace awareness, yet AI agents typically either provide only final outputs or expose read-only execution processes (e.g., planning, reasoning) without interpreting concurrent user actions on shared artifacts. Building on mixed-initiative interaction principles, we explore whether agents can achieve collaborative context awareness -- interpreting concurrent user actions on shared artifacts and adapting in real-time. Study 1 (N=10 professional designers) revealed that process visibility enabled reasoning about agent actions but exposed conflicts when agents could not distinguish feedback from independent work. We developed CLEO, which interprets collaborative intent and adapts in real-time. Study 2 (N=10, two-day with stimulated recall interviews) analyzed 214 turns, identifying five action patterns, six triggers, and four enabling factors explaining when designers choose delegation (70.1%), direction (28.5%), or concurrent work (31.8%). We present a decision model with six interaction loops, design implications, and an annotated dataset.
tldr: This paper explores how AI agents can achieve collaborative context awareness by interpreting concurrent user actions in co-creative tasks, presenting an agent, CLEO, and a decision model for human-agent interaction.
tldr_zh: 本文探讨了AI agent如何通过在共同创作任务中解释并发用户操作来实现协作上下文感知，展示了一个名为CLEO的agent以及人机交互的决策模型。
summary_zh: 人类协作者通过过程可见性和工作空间感知动态地进行协作，但人工智能代理通常要么只提供最终输出，要么只暴露只读的执行过程（例如，规划、推理），而不解释用户对共享工件的并发操作。基于混合主动交互原则，我们探索代理是否能实现协作上下文感知——解释用户对共享工件的并发操作并实时调整。研究1（N=10名专业设计师）表明，过程可见性能够推理代理行为，但当代理无法区分反馈和独立工作时，会暴露冲突。我们开发了CLEO，它可以解释协作意图并实时调整。研究2（N=10，为期两天的刺激回忆访谈）分析了214个回合，识别出五个动作模式、六个触发因素和四个促成因素，这些因素解释了设计师何时选择委派（70.1%）、指示（28.5%）或并发工作（31.8%）。我们提出了一个包含六个交互循环的决策模型、设计启示和一个带注释的数据集。

title: Hyperparameter Trajectory Inference with Conditional Lagrangian Optimal Transport
summary: Neural networks (NNs) often have critical behavioural trade-offs that are set at design time with hyperparameters-such as reward weights in reinforcement learning or quantile targets in regression. Post-deployment, however, user preferences can evolve, making initial settings undesirable, necessitating potentially expensive retraining. To circumvent this, we introduce the task of Hyperparameter Trajectory Inference (HTI): to learn, from observed data, how a NN's conditional output distribution changes with its hyperparameters, and construct a surrogate model that approximates the NN at unobserved hyperparameter settings. HTI requires extending existing trajectory inference approaches to incorporate conditions, exacerbating the challenge of ensuring inferred paths are feasible. We propose an approach based on conditional Lagrangian optimal transport, jointly learning the Lagrangian function governing hyperparameter-induced dynamics along with the associated optimal transport maps and geodesics between observed marginals, which form the surrogate model. We incorporate inductive biases based on the manifold hypothesis and least-action principles into the learned Lagrangian, improving surrogate model feasibility. We empirically demonstrate that our approach reconstructs NN outputs across various hyperparameter spectra better than other alternatives.
tldr: The paper introduces Hyperparameter Trajectory Inference (HTI) using conditional Lagrangian optimal transport to build surrogate models that predict a neural network's output distribution changes with respect to hyperparameters, avoiding expensive retraining when user preferences evolve.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了超参数轨迹推断（HTI），它使用条件拉格朗日最优传输来构建代理模型，以预测神经网络输出分布随超参数的变化，从而避免在用户偏好发生变化时进行昂贵的重新训练。
summary_zh: 神经网络（NNs）通常具有关键的行为权衡，这些权衡在设计时由超参数设置，例如强化学习中的奖励权重或回归中的分位数目标。然而，部署后，用户偏好可能会演变，使得初始设置变得不理想，从而需要潜在的昂贵的重新训练。为了规避这种情况，我们引入了超参数轨迹推断（HTI）的任务：从观察到的数据中学习神经网络的条件输出分布如何随其超参数变化，并构建一个替代模型，以近似神经网络在未观察到的超参数设置下的行为。HTI需要扩展现有的轨迹推断方法以纳入条件，从而加剧了确保推断路径可行的挑战。我们提出了一种基于条件拉格朗日最优传输的方法，联合学习控制超参数诱导动态的拉格朗日函数，以及相关的最优传输映射和观测到的边缘分布之间的测地线，这些共同构成替代模型。我们将基于流形假设和最小作用量原理的归纳偏置纳入到学习的拉格朗日函数中，从而提高了替代模型的可行性。我们通过实验证明，我们的方法在各种超参数谱上重建神经网络输出的效果优于其他替代方法。

title: SEED-SET: Scalable Evolving Experimental Design for System-level Ethical Testing
summary: As autonomous systems such as drones, become increasingly deployed in high-stakes, human-centric domains, it is critical to evaluate the ethical alignment since failure to do so imposes imminent danger to human lives, and long term bias in decision-making. Automated ethical benchmarking of these systems is understudied due to the lack of ubiquitous, well-defined metrics for evaluation, and stakeholder-specific subjectivity, which cannot be modeled analytically. To address these challenges, we propose SEED-SET, a Bayesian experimental design framework that incorporates domain-specific objective evaluations, and subjective value judgments from stakeholders. SEED-SET models both evaluation types separately with hierarchical Gaussian Processes, and uses a novel acquisition strategy to propose interesting test candidates based on learnt qualitative preferences and objectives that align with the stakeholder preferences. We validate our approach for ethical benchmarking of autonomous agents on two applications and find our method to perform the best. Our method provides an interpretable and efficient trade-off between exploration and exploitation, by generating up to $2\times$ optimal test candidates compared to baselines, with $1.25\times$ improvement in coverage of high dimensional search spaces.
tldr: The paper introduces SEED-SET, a Bayesian experimental design framework for automated ethical benchmarking of autonomous systems, incorporating both objective evaluations and subjective stakeholder value judgments, and claims to outperform baselines in generating optimal test candidates.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了SEED-SET，一个用于自动评估自主系统伦理的贝叶斯实验设计框架。该框架结合了客观评估和主观利益相关者价值判断，并声称在生成最佳测试候选方面优于基线方法。
summary_zh: 随着无人机等自主系统越来越多地部署在高风险、以人为中心的领域，评估其伦理一致性至关重要，因为未能做到这一点会对人类生命构成迫在眉睫的危险，并在决策中产生长期的偏见。由于缺乏普遍通用的、定义明确的评估指标，以及无法进行分析建模的、与利益相关者相关的特定主观性，对这些系统的自动伦理基准测试尚未得到充分研究。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种名为SEED-SET的贝叶斯实验设计框架，该框架整合了领域特定的客观评估和来自利益相关者的主观价值判断。SEED-SET使用分层高斯过程分别对两种评估类型进行建模，并采用一种新颖的获取策略，基于学习到的定性偏好和符合利益相关者偏好的目标，提出有趣的测试候选对象。我们在两个应用上验证了我们的自主智能体伦理基准测试方法，并发现我们的方法表现最佳。我们的方法通过生成比基线方法最多高2倍的最优测试候选对象，并在高维搜索空间的覆盖率上提升1.25倍，从而在探索和利用之间提供了一种可解释且高效的权衡。

title: Stereo-Inertial Poser: Towards Metric-Accurate Shape-Aware Motion Capture Using Sparse IMUs and a Single Stereo Camera
summary: Recent advancements in visual-inertial motion capture systems have demonstrated the potential of combining monocular cameras with sparse inertial measurement units (IMUs) as cost-effective solutions, which effectively mitigate occlusion and drift issues inherent in single-modality systems. However, they are still limited by metric inaccuracies in global translations stemming from monocular depth ambiguity, and shape-agnostic local motion estimations that ignore anthropometric variations. We present Stereo-Inertial Poser, a real-time motion capture system that leverages a single stereo camera and six IMUs to estimate metric-accurate and shape-aware 3D human motion. By replacing the monocular RGB with stereo vision, our system resolves depth ambiguity through calibrated baseline geometry, enabling direct 3D keypoint extraction and body shape parameter estimation. IMU data and visual cues are fused for predicting drift-compensated joint positions and root movements, while a novel shape-aware fusion module dynamically harmonizes anthropometry variations with global translations. Our end-to-end pipeline achieves over 200 FPS without optimization-based post-processing, enabling real-time deployment. Quantitative evaluations across various datasets demonstrate state-of-the-art performance. Qualitative results show our method produces drift-free global translation under a long recording time and reduces foot-skating effects.
tldr: The paper introduces Stereo-Inertial Poser, a real-time motion capture system using a stereo camera and IMUs to achieve metric-accurate and shape-aware 3D human motion capture at over 200 FPS.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为Stereo-Inertial Poser的实时运动捕捉系统，该系统使用立体相机和IMU，以超过200FPS的速度实现度量精确和形状感知的3D人体运动捕捉。
summary_zh: 视觉惯性运动捕捉系统近期的进展表明，将单目相机与稀疏惯性测量单元(IMU)结合作为一种经济高效的解决方案具有潜力，能够有效缓解单模态系统中固有的遮挡和漂移问题。然而，它们仍然受到源于单目深度模糊的全局平移中的度量不准确性，以及忽略人体测量学差异的与形状无关的局部运动估计的限制。我们提出了Stereo-Inertial Poser，一个实时的运动捕捉系统，它利用单个立体相机和六个IMU来估计度量精确且感知的3D人体运动。通过用立体视觉取代单目RGB，我们的系统通过校准后的基线几何解决深度模糊，从而能够直接进行3D关键点提取和身体形状参数估计。IMU数据和视觉线索被融合用于预测漂移补偿的关节位置和根部运动，同时一种新颖的形状感知融合模块动态地将人体测量学差异与全局平移相协调。我们的端到端流程无需基于优化的后处理即可实现超过200 FPS，从而实现实时部署。在各种数据集上的定量评估表明了最先进的性能。定性结果表明，我们的方法在长时间录制下产生无漂移的全局平移，并减少了足部滑动效应。

title: BAWSeg: A UAV Multispectral Benchmark for Barley Weed Segmentation
summary: Accurate weed mapping in cereal fields requires pixel-level segmentation from UAV imagery that remains reliable across fields, seasons, and illumination. Existing multispectral pipelines often depend on thresholded vegetation indices, which are brittle under radiometric drift and mixed crop--weed pixels, or on single-stream CNN and Transformer backbones that ingest stacked bands and indices, where radiance cues and normalized index cues interfere and reduce sensitivity to small weed clusters embedded in crop canopies. We propose VISA (Vegetation-Index and Spectral Attention), a two-stream segmentation network that decouples these cues and fuses them at native resolution. The radiance stream learns from calibrated five-band reflectance using residual spectral-spatial attention to preserve fine textures and row boundaries that are attenuated by ratio indices. The index stream operates on vegetation-index maps with windowed self-attention to model local structure efficiently, state-space layers to propagate field-scale context without quadratic attention cost, and Slot Attention to form stable region descriptors that improve discrimination of sparse weeds under canopy mixing. To support supervised training and deployment-oriented evaluation, we introduce BAWSeg, a four-year UAV multispectral dataset collected over commercial barley paddocks in Western Australia, providing radiometrically calibrated blue, green, red, red edge, and near-infrared orthomosaics, derived vegetation indices, and dense crop, weed, and other labels with leakage-free block splits. On BAWSeg, VISA achieves 75.6% mIoU and 63.5% weed IoU with 22.8M parameters, outperforming a multispectral SegFormer-B1 baseline by 1.2 mIoU and 1.9 weed IoU. Under cross-plot and cross-year protocols, VISA maintains 71.2% and 69.2% mIoU, respectively. The BAWSeg data, VISA code, and trained models will be released upon publication.
tldr: The paper introduces BAWSeg, a new UAV multispectral dataset for barley weed segmentation, and proposes VISA, a two-stream segmentation network leveraging both vegetation indices and spectral attention to achieve improved performance and robustness compared to existing methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了BAWSeg，一个新的无人机多光谱数据集，用于大麦杂草分割，并提出了VISA，一个双流分割网络，利用植被指数和光谱注意力，与现有方法相比，实现了更高的性能和鲁棒性。
summary_zh: 在谷类作物田中进行精确的杂草测绘需要从无人机影像中进行像素级的分割，且在不同田地、季节和光照条件下保持可靠性。现有的多光谱流程通常依赖于阈值化的植被指数，这些指数在辐射漂移和作物-杂草混合像素下表现脆弱；或者依赖于单流CNN和Transformer主干网络，这些网络摄取堆叠的波段和指数，其中辐射线索和归一化指数线索相互干扰，降低了对嵌入在作物冠层中的小杂草簇的敏感性。我们提出了VISA（植被指数和光谱注意力），一种双流分割网络，可解耦这些线索并在原始分辨率下融合它们。辐射流使用残差光谱-空间注意力从校准的五波段反射率中学习，以保留被比率指数衰减的精细纹理和行边界。指数流对植被指数图进行操作，使用窗口自注意力来有效地建模局部结构，使用状态空间层来传播田地尺度的上下文而无需二次注意力代价，并使用槽注意力来形成稳定的区域描述符，从而提高对冠层混合下稀疏杂草的区分度。为了支持监督训练和面向部署的评估，我们推出了BAWSeg，一个为期四年的无人机多光谱数据集，该数据集是在西澳大利亚的商业大麦地块上收集的，提供经过辐射校准的蓝色、绿色、红色、红边和近红外正射影像、导出的植被指数，以及具有无泄漏区块分割的密集作物、杂草和其他标签。在BAWSeg上，VISA以2280万个参数实现了75.6%的mIoU和63.5%的杂草IoU，优于多光谱SegFormer-B1基线1.2 mIoU和1.9杂草IoU。在交叉地块和交叉年份协议下，VISA分别保持了71.2%和69.2%的mIoU。BAWSeg数据、VISA代码和训练好的模型将在发表后发布。

title: PromptStereo: Zero-Shot Stereo Matching via Structure and Motion Prompts
summary: Modern stereo matching methods have leveraged monocular depth foundation models to achieve superior zero-shot generalization performance. However, most existing methods primarily focus on extracting robust features for cost volume construction or disparity initialization. At the same time, the iterative refinement stage, which is also crucial for zero-shot generalization, remains underexplored. Some methods treat monocular depth priors as guidance for iteration, but conventional GRU-based architectures struggle to exploit them due to the limited representation capacity. In this paper, we propose Prompt Recurrent Unit (PRU), a novel iterative refinement module based on the decoder of monocular depth foundation models. By integrating monocular structure and stereo motion cues as prompts into the decoder, PRU enriches the latent representations of monocular depth foundation models with absolute stereo-scale information while preserving their inherent monocular depth priors. Experiments demonstrate that our PromptStereo achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot generalization performance across multiple datasets, while maintaining comparable or faster inference speed. Our findings highlight prompt-guided iterative refinement as a promising direction for zero-shot stereo matching.
tldr: The paper introduces PromptStereo, a novel zero-shot stereo matching method that utilizes a Prompt Recurrent Unit (PRU) to refine disparity estimation by integrating structure and motion cues into a monocular depth foundation model's decoder, achieving state-of-the-art performance.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为PromptStereo的新型零样本立体匹配方法，该方法利用Prompt循环单元（PRU）通过将结构和运动线索集成到单目深度基础模型的解码器中来细化视差估计，从而实现最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 现代立体匹配方法已经利用单目深度基础模型来实现卓越的零样本泛化性能。然而，现有方法大多主要集中于提取鲁棒特征以用于代价体构建或视差初始化。同时，迭代精炼阶段，对于零样本泛化同样至关重要，却仍有待进一步探索。一些方法将单目深度先验视为迭代的指导，但传统的基于GRU的架构由于表示能力有限，难以充分利用它们。在本文中，我们提出Prompt Recurrent Unit (PRU)，一种基于单目深度基础模型解码器的新型迭代精炼模块。通过将单目结构和立体运动线索作为提示(prompt)整合到解码器中，PRU在保留其内在单目深度先验的同时，利用绝对立体比例信息丰富了单目深度基础模型的潜在表示。实验表明，我们的PromptStereo在多个数据集上实现了最先进的零样本泛化性能，同时保持了可比或更快的推理速度。我们的研究结果强调了提示引导的迭代精炼是零样本立体匹配的一个有前景的方向。

title: Boosting AI Reliability with an FSM-Driven Streaming Inference Pipeline: An Industrial Case
summary: The widespread adoption of AI in industry is often hampered by its limited robustness when faced with scenarios absent from training data, leading to prediction bias and vulnerabilities. To address this, we propose a novel streaming inference pipeline that enhances data-driven models by explicitly incorporating prior knowledge. This paper presents the work on an industrial AI application that automatically counts excavator workloads from surveillance videos. Our approach integrates an object detection model with a Finite State Machine (FSM), which encodes knowledge of operational scenarios to guide and correct the AI's predictions on streaming data. In experiments on a real-world dataset of over 7,000 images from 12 site videos, encompassing more than 300 excavator workloads, our method demonstrates superior performance and greater robustness compared to the original solution based on manual heuristic rules. We will release the code at https://github.com/thulab/video-streamling-inference-pipeline.
tldr: This paper presents a streaming inference pipeline using Finite State Machines (FSMs) to enhance the reliability of AI models in industrial applications, specifically excavator workload counting from surveillance videos.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种使用有限状态机（FSM）的流式推理管道，以提高人工智能模型在工业应用中的可靠性，特别是从监控视频中计数挖掘机的工作量。
summary_zh:
摘要：
人工智能在工业界的广泛应用常常受到其在面临训练数据中未出现的场景时鲁棒性不足的限制，从而导致预测偏差和脆弱性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的流式推理管道，通过显式地结合先验知识来增强数据驱动的模型。本文介绍了一项工业人工智能应用的工作，该应用旨在从监控视频中自动计数挖掘机的工作负载。我们的方法将目标检测模型与有限状态机（FSM）相结合，有限状态机编码了操作场景的知识，以指导和纠正人工智能对流数据的预测。在包含来自12个站点视频的超过7,000张图像的真实世界数据集（涵盖300多个挖掘机工作负载）上的实验表明，与基于手动启发式规则的原始解决方案相比，我们的方法展示了更优越的性能和更高的鲁棒性。我们将在https://github.com/thulab/video-streamling-inference-pipeline发布代码。

title: SCATR: Mitigating New Instance Suppression in LiDAR-based Tracking-by-Attention via Second Chance Assignment and Track Query Dropout
summary:
LiDAR-based tracking-by-attention (TBA) frameworks inherently suffer from high false negative errors, leading to a significant performance gap compared to traditional LiDAR-based tracking-by-detection (TBD) methods. This paper introduces SCATR, a novel LiDAR-based TBA model designed to address this fundamental challenge systematically. SCATR leverages recent progress in vision-based tracking and incorporates targeted training strategies specifically adapted for LiDAR.
  Our work's core innovations are two architecture-agnostic training strategies for TBA methods: Second Chance Assignment and Track Query Dropout.
  Second Chance Assignment is a novel ground truth assignment that concatenates unassigned track queries to the proposal queries before bipartite matching, giving these track queries a second chance to be assigned to a ground truth object and effectively mitigating the conflict between detection and tracking tasks inherent in tracking-by-attention.
  Track Query Dropout is a training method that diversifies supervised object query configurations to efficiently train the decoder to handle different track query sets, enhancing robustness to missing or newborn tracks.
  Experiments on the nuScenes tracking benchmark demonstrate that SCATR achieves state-of-the-art performance among LiDAR-based TBA methods, outperforming previous works by 7.6\% AMOTA and successfully bridging the long-standing performance gap between LiDAR-based TBA and TBD methods.
  Ablation studies further validate the effectiveness and generalization of Second Chance Assignment and Track Query Dropout.
  Code can be found at the following link: \href{https://github.com/TRAILab/SCATR}{https://github.com/TRAILab/SCATR}
tldr: The paper presents SCATR, a novel LiDAR-based tracking-by-attention model with two architecture-agnostic training strategies (Second Chance Assignment and Track Query Dropout) that achieves state-of-the-art performance and closes the performance gap with tracking-by-detection methods on the nuScenes dataset.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了SCATR，一种新颖的基于LiDAR的跟踪-注意模型，具有两种架构无关的训练策略（第二次机会分配和跟踪查询退出），该模型在nuScenes数据集上实现了最先进的性能，并缩小了与跟踪-检测方法的性能差距。
summary_zh:
基于激光雷达的注意力跟踪(TBA)框架天然存在较高的假阴性错误率，导致其性能与传统的基于激光雷达的检测跟踪(TBD)方法相比存在显著差距。本文提出了一种新型的基于激光雷达的TBA模型SCATR，旨在系统地解决这一根本性挑战。SCATR利用了基于视觉的跟踪领域的最新进展，并结合了专门为激光雷达量身定制的有针对性的训练策略。

  我们工作的核心创新在于两种架构无关的TBA方法训练策略：二次机会分配和轨迹查询Dropout。

  二次机会分配是一种新颖的真实标签分配方法，它在二分匹配之前将未分配的轨迹查询与建议查询连接起来，使这些轨迹查询有第二次机会分配给真实标签对象，从而有效地缓解了注意力跟踪中固有的检测和跟踪任务之间的冲突。

  轨迹查询Dropout是一种训练方法，它使监督对象查询配置多样化，以有效地训练解码器来处理不同的轨迹查询集，从而增强对丢失或新生轨迹的鲁棒性。

  在nuScenes跟踪基准上的实验表明，SCATR在基于激光雷达的TBA方法中实现了最先进的性能，超越了之前的作品7.6%的AMOTA，并成功地弥合了基于激光雷达的TBA和TBD方法之间长期存在的性能差距。

  消融研究进一步验证了二次机会分配和轨迹查询Dropout的有效性和泛化性。

  代码位于以下链接：\href{https://github.com/TRAILab/SCATR}{https://github.com/TRAILab/SCATR}

title: SeaVIS: Sound-Enhanced Association for Online Audio-Visual Instance Segmentation
summary: Recently, an audio-visual instance segmentation (AVIS) task has been introduced, aiming to identify, segment and track individual sounding instances in videos. However, prevailing methods primarily adopt the offline paradigm, that cannot associate detected instances across consecutive clips, making them unsuitable for real-world scenarios that involve continuous video streams. To address this limitation, we introduce SeaVIS, the first online framework designed for audio-visual instance segmentation. SeaVIS leverages the Causal Cross Attention Fusion (CCAF) module to enable efficient online processing, which integrates visual features from the current frame with the entire audio history under strict causal constraints. A major challenge for conventional VIS methods is that appearance-based instance association fails to distinguish between an object's sounding and silent states, resulting in the incorrect segmentation of silent objects. To tackle this, we employ an Audio-Guided Contrastive Learning (AGCL) strategy to generate instance prototypes that encode not only visual appearance but also sounding activity. In this way, instances preserved during per-frame prediction that do not emit sound can be effectively suppressed during instance association process, thereby significantly enhancing the audio-following capability of SeaVIS. Extensive experiments conducted on the AVISeg dataset demonstrate that SeaVIS surpasses existing state-of-the-art models across multiple evaluation metrics while maintaining a competitive inference speed suitable for real-time processing.
tldr: The paper introduces SeaVIS, the first online audio-visual instance segmentation framework. It addresses the limitations of offline methods by using causal attention and audio-guided contrastive learning to improve instance association in continuous video streams, especially for distinguishing between sounding and silent states.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了SeaVIS，这是第一个在线的音视频实例分割框架。它通过使用因果注意力和音频引导的对比学习来改善连续视频流中的实例关联，解决了离线方法的局限性，尤其是在区分发声和静默状态方面。
summary_zh: 近来，出现了一种音视频实例分割（AVIS）任务，旨在识别、分割和跟踪视频中独立的有声实例。然而，目前主流的方法主要采用离线模式，无法将连续片段中检测到的实例相关联，使其不适用于涉及连续视频流的现实场景。为了解决这一局限性，我们引入 SeaVIS，这是第一个专为音视频实例分割设计的在线框架。SeaVIS 利用因果交叉注意力融合（CCAF）模块来实现高效的在线处理，该模块在严格的因果约束下将当前帧的视觉特征与整个音频历史记录相结合。传统 VIS 方法的一个主要挑战是，基于外观的实例关联无法区分对象的有声和无声状态，导致无声对象的错误分割。为了解决这个问题，我们采用音频引导对比学习（AGCL）策略来生成实例原型，该原型不仅编码视觉外观，还编码声音活动。通过这种方式，可以在逐帧预测期间保留的、不发出声音的实例在实例关联过程中被有效抑制，从而显著增强 SeaVIS 的音频跟随能力。在 AVISeg 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，SeaVIS 在多个评估指标上超越了现有的最先进模型，同时保持了适合实时处理的具有竞争力的推理速度。

title: UETrack: A Unified and Efficient Framework for Single Object Tracking
summary: With growing real-world demands, efficient tracking has received increasing attention. However, most existing methods are limited to RGB inputs and struggle in multi-modal scenarios. Moreover, current multi-modal tracking approaches typically use complex designs, making them too heavy and slow for resource-constrained deployment. To tackle these limitations, we propose UETrack, an efficient framework for single object tracking. UETrack demonstrates high practicality and versatility, efficiently handling multiple modalities including RGB, Depth, Thermal, Event, and Language, and addresses the gap in efficient multi-modal tracking. It introduces two key components: a Token-Pooling-based Mixture-of-Experts mechanism that enhances modeling capacity through feature aggregation and expert specialization, and a Target-aware Adaptive Distillation strategy that selectively performs distillation based on sample characteristics, reducing redundant supervision and improving performance. Extensive experiments on 12 benchmarks across 3 hardware platforms show that UETrack achieves a superior speed-accuracy trade-off compared to previous methods. For instance, UETrack-B achieves 69.2% AUC on LaSOT and runs at 163/56/60 FPS on GPU/CPU/AGX, demonstrating strong practicality and versatility. Code is available at https://github.com/kangben258/UETrack.
tldr: UETrack is a new efficient single object tracking framework that handles multi-modal data (RGB, Depth, Thermal, Event, Language) using a Token-Pooling Mixture-of-Experts and Target-aware Adaptive Distillation, achieving superior speed-accuracy trade-offs.
tldr_zh: UETrack是一个新的高效单目标跟踪框架，它使用基于Token-Pooling 的混合专家模型和目标感知的自适应蒸馏来处理多模态数据（RGB、深度、热感、事件、语言），从而实现了卓越的速度-精度平衡。
summary_zh: 随着现实世界需求的增长，高效跟踪日益受到关注。然而，大多数现有方法仅限于RGB输入，并且在多模态场景中表现不佳。此外，当前的多模态跟踪方法通常采用复杂的设计，导致其过于繁重且速度慢，难以在资源受限的环境中部署。为了克服这些限制，我们提出UETrack，一种用于单目标跟踪的高效框架。UETrack展示了高度的实用性和通用性，能够高效地处理包括RGB、深度、热成像、事件和语言在内的多种模态，并弥补了高效多模态跟踪领域的空白。它引入了两个关键组件：一种基于Token-Pooling的混合专家机制，通过特征聚合和专家特化来增强建模能力；以及一种目标感知自适应知识蒸馏策略，该策略基于样本特征选择性地执行知识蒸馏，以减少冗余监督并提高性能。在3个硬件平台的12个基准测试上的大量实验表明，与先前的方法相比，UETrack实现了卓越的速度-精度权衡。例如，UETrack-B在LaSOT上实现了69.2%的AUC，并在GPU/CPU/AGX上分别以163/56/60 FPS的速度运行，展现出强大的实用性和通用性。代码已在https://github.com/kangben258/UETrack上提供。

title: Causal Effects with Unobserved Unit Types in Interacting Human-AI Systems
summary: We study experiments on interacting populations of humans and AI agents, where both unit types and the interaction network remain unobserved. Although causal effects propagate throughout the system, the goal is to estimate effects on humans. Examples include online platforms where human users interact alongside AI-driven accounts. We assume a human-AI prior that gives each unit a probability of being human. While humans cannot be distinguished at the unit level, the prior allows us to compute the average human composition within large subpopulations. We then model outcome dynamics through a causal message passing (CMP) framework and analyze sample-mean outcomes across subpopulations. We show that by constructing subpopulations that vary in expected human composition and treatment exposure, one can consistently recover human-specific causal effects. Our results characterize when distributional knowledge of population composition (without observing unit types or the interaction network) is sufficient for identification. We validate the approach on a simulated human-AI platform driven by behaviorally differentiated LLM agents. Together, these results provide a theoretical and practical framework for experimentation in emerging human-AI systems.
tldr: This paper presents a method to estimate human-specific causal effects in human-AI interaction systems where unit types (human vs. AI) and the interaction network are unobserved, using distributional knowledge of population composition and a causal message passing framework.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种在人机交互系统中估计人类特定因果效应的方法，其中个体类型（人类与人工智能）和交互网络均未被观察到，该方法利用种群组成分布知识和因果消息传递框架。
summary_zh: 我们研究了人类和人工智能agent相互作用的群体实验，其中单元类型和交互网络均未被观察到。尽管因果效应在整个系统中传播，但目标是估计对人类的影响。例如，在线平台上人类用户与人工智能驱动的账户互动。我们假设存在一个人类-AI先验，它赋予每个单元成为人类的概率。虽然人类无法在单元级别上区分，但先验允许我们计算大型亚群体内人类的平均构成。然后，我们通过因果消息传递（CMP）框架对结果动态进行建模，并分析跨亚群体的样本均值结果。我们证明通过构建在预期人类构成和治疗暴露方面存在差异的亚群体，可以一致地恢复特定于人类的因果效应。我们的结果描述了何时群体构成的分布知识（在不观察单元类型或交互网络的情况下）足以进行识别。我们通过由行为差异化的大语言模型 agent驱动的模拟人类-AI平台验证了该方法。总之，这些结果为新兴的人类-AI系统中的实验提供了一个理论和实践框架。

title: B$^2$F-Map: Crowd-sourced Mapping with Bayesian B-spline Fusion
summary: Crowd-sourced mapping offers a scalable alternative to creating maps using traditional survey vehicles. Yet, existing methods either rely on prior high-definition (HD) maps or neglect uncertainties in the map fusion. In this work, we present a complete pipeline for HD map generation using production vehicles equipped only with a monocular camera, consumer-grade GNSS, and IMU. Our approach includes on-cloud localization using lightweight standard-definition maps, on-vehicle mapping via an extended object trajectory (EOT) Poisson multi-Bernoulli (PMB) filter with Gibbs sampling, and on-cloud multi-drive optimization and Bayesian map fusion. We represent the lane lines using B-splines, where each B-spline is parameterized by a sequence of Gaussian distributed control points, and propose a novel Bayesian fusion framework for B-spline trajectories with differing density representation, enabling principled handling of uncertainties. We evaluate our proposed approach, B$^2$F-Map, on large-scale real-world datasets collected across diverse driving conditions and demonstrate that our method is able to produce geometrically consistent lane-level maps.
tldr: This paper proposes B$^2$F-Map, a pipeline for HD map generation using crowd-sourced data and Bayesian B-spline fusion to handle uncertainties in lane line estimation from monocular cameras and consumer-grade sensors.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了B$^2$F-Map，一个使用众包数据生成高精度地图的流水线，并利用贝叶斯B样条融合来处理单目相机和消费级传感器车道线估计中的不确定性。
summary_zh: 众包地图提供了一种可扩展的替代方案，用于替代传统的测量车辆来创建地图。然而，现有方法要么依赖于先前的高清 (HD) 地图，要么忽略了地图融合中的不确定性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个完整的流程，用于使用仅配备单目相机、消费级 GNSS 和 IMU 的量产车辆生成 HD 地图。我们的方法包括：使用轻量级标清地图的云端定位、通过带有 Gibbs 采样的扩展目标轨迹 (EOT) 泊松多伯努利 (PMB) 滤波器的车载地图绘制，以及云端的多车优化和贝叶斯地图融合。我们使用 B 样条来表示车道线，其中每个 B 样条都由一系列高斯分布的控制点参数化，并且提出了一种新颖的 B 样条轨迹贝叶斯融合框架，该框架具有不同的密度表示，从而能够以合理的方式处理不确定性。我们在跨越各种驾驶条件的大规模真实世界数据集上评估了我们提出的方法 B$^2$F-Map，并证明我们的方法能够生成几何一致的车道级地图。

title: PreSight: Preoperative Outcome Prediction for Parkinson's Disease via Region-Prior Morphometry and Patient-Specific Weighting
summary: Preoperative improvement rate prediction for Parkinson's disease surgery is clinically important yet difficult because imaging signals are subtle and patients are heterogeneous. We address this setting, where only information available before surgery is used, and the goal is to predict patient-specific postoperative motor benefit. We present PreSight, a presurgical outcome model that fuses clinical priors with preoperative MRI and deformation-based morphometry (DBM) and adapts regional importance through a patient-specific weighting module. The model produces end-to-end, calibrated, decision-ready predictions with patient-level explanations. We evaluate PreSight on a real-world two-center cohort of 400 subjects with multimodal presurgical inputs and postoperative improvement labels. PreSight outperforms strong clinical, imaging-only, and multimodal baselines. It attains 88.89% accuracy on internal validation and 85.29% on an external-center test for responder classification and shows better probability calibration and higher decision-curve net benefit. Ablations and analyses confirm the contribution of DBM and the patient-specific weighting module and indicate that the model emphasizes disease-relevant regions in a patient-specific manner. These results demonstrate that integrating clinical prior knowledge with region-adaptive morphometry enables reliable presurgical decision support in routine practice.
tldr: The paper presents PreSight, a preoperative outcome prediction model for Parkinson's disease surgery using MRI, deformation-based morphometry, and patient-specific weighting, achieving high accuracy in predicting postoperative motor benefit.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了 PreSight，一个用于预测帕金森病手术术前结果的模型，它利用 MRI、基于形变的形态测量学以及患者特异性权重，在高精度预测术后运动功能改善方面表现出色。
summary_zh: 预测帕金森病手术的术前改善率在临床上至关重要，但由于影像信号微妙且患者异质性较高而具有挑战性。我们针对仅使用术前信息且目标是预测患者特异性术后运动获益的情况，提出了PreSight，一个术前结果模型，它融合了临床先验知识与术前MRI和基于形变的形态测量学(DBM)，并通过患者特异性的加权模块来调整区域重要性。该模型产生端到端、校准过的、可用于决策的预测，并提供患者层面的解释。我们在一个真实的、包含400名受试者的双中心队列上评估了PreSight，该队列具有多模态术前输入和术后改善标签。PreSight优于强大的临床、仅影像和多模态基线模型。对于响应者分类，PreSight在内部验证中达到88.89%的准确率，在外部中心的测试中达到85.29%，并显示出更好的概率校准和更高的决策曲线净收益。消融实验和分析证实了DBM和患者特异性加权模块的贡献，并表明该模型以患者特异性的方式强调疾病相关区域。这些结果表明，将临床先验知识与区域自适应形态测量学相结合，可以在常规实践中实现可靠的术前决策支持。

title: AutoFFS: Adversarial Deformations for Facial Feminization Surgery Planning
summary: Facial feminization surgery (FFS) is a key component of gender affirmation for transgender and gender diverse patients, aiming to reshape craniofacial structures toward a female morphology. Current surgical planning procedures largely rely on subjective clinical assessment, lacking quantitative and reproducible anatomical guidance. We therefore propose AutoFFS, a novel data-driven framework that generates counterfactual skull morphologies through adversarial free-form deformations. Our method performs a deformation-based targeted adversarial attack on an ensemble of pre-trained binary sex classifiers that learned sexual dimorphism, effectively transforming individual skull shapes toward the target sex. The generated counterfactual skull morphologies provide a quantitative foundation for preoperative planning in FFS, driving advances in this largely overlooked patient group. We validate our approach through classifier-based evaluation and a human perceptual study, confirming that the generated morphologies exhibit target sex characteristics.
tldr: The paper introduces AutoFFS, a data-driven framework using adversarial deformations to generate counterfactual skull morphologies for facial feminization surgery planning, aiming to provide quantitative guidance for the procedure.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个名为AutoFFS的框架，它使用对抗性形变来生成颅骨形态，用于面部女性化手术的规划，旨在为该手术提供定量指导。
summary_zh: 面部女性化手术 (FFS) 是跨性别和性别多样化患者性别肯定过程的关键组成部分，旨在将颅面结构重塑成女性形态。当前的手术规划流程主要依赖于主观的临床评估，缺乏定量和可重复的解剖学指导。因此，我们提出 AutoFFS，一种新颖的数据驱动框架，通过对抗性自由形变生成反事实的颅骨形态。我们的方法对预训练二元性别分类器集成执行基于形变的靶向性对抗攻击，这些分类器学习了性别二态性，从而有效地将个体颅骨形状转换到目标性别。生成的反事实颅骨形态为 FFS 的术前规划提供了定量的基础，推动了对这个在很大程度上被忽视的患者群体的进展。我们通过基于分类器的评估和人类感知研究验证了我们的方法，证实生成的形态表现出目标性别的特征。

title: Affine Correspondences in Stereo Vision: Theory, Practice, and Limitations
summary: Affine transformations have been recently used for stereo vision. They can be exploited in various computer vision application, e.g., when estimating surface normals, homographies, fundamental and essential matrices. Even full 3D reconstruction can be obtained by using affine correspondences. First, this paper overviews the fundamental statements for affine transformations and epipolar geometry. Then it is investigated how the transformation accuracy influences the quality of the 3D reconstruction. Besides, we propose novel techniques for estimating the local affine transformation from corresponding image directions; moreover, the fundamental matrix, related to the processed image pair, can also be exploited. Both synthetic and real quantitative evaluations are implemented based on the accuracy of the reconstructed surface normals. For the latter one, a special object, containing three perpendicular planes with chessboard patterns, is constructed. The quantitative evaluations are based on the accuracy of the reconstructed surface normals and it is concluded that the estimation accuracy is around a few degrees for realistic test cases. Special stereo poses and plane orientations are also evaluated in detail.
tldr: This paper presents techniques for estimating affine transformations in stereo vision to improve 3D reconstruction accuracy, particularly for surface normals, and evaluates performance on both synthetic and real data.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种在立体视觉中估计仿射变换的技术，以提高三维重建的精度，特别是对于表面法线，并在合成数据和真实数据上评估了性能。
summary_zh: 仿射变换最近已被应用于立体视觉。它们可在各种计算机视觉应用中被利用，例如在估计表面法向量、单应性、基本矩阵和本质矩阵时。甚至可以通过仿射对应关系获得完整的3D重建。本文首先概述了仿射变换和对极几何的基本原理。然后，研究了变换精度如何影响3D重建的质量。此外，我们提出了一种从对应图像方向估计局部仿射变换的新技术；而且，与处理后的图像对相关的基本矩阵也可以被利用。基于重建的表面法向量的准确性，实现了合成和真实的定量评估。对于后者，构建了一个特殊的物体，包含三个带有棋盘格图案的垂直平面。定量评估基于重建的表面法向量的准确性，结论是对于实际的测试用例，估计精度约为几度。一些特殊的立体姿态和平面方向也进行了详细评估。

title: Preoperative-to-intraoperative Liver Registration for Laparoscopic Surgery via Latent-Grounded Correspondence Constraints
summary: In laparoscopic liver surgery, augmented reality technology enhances intraoperative anatomical guidance by overlaying 3D liver models from preoperative CT/MRI onto laparoscopic 2D views. However, existing registration methods lack explicit modeling of reliable 2D-3D geometric correspondences supported by latent evidence, leading to limited interpretability and potentially unstable alignment in clinical scenarios. In this work, we introduce Land-Reg, a correspondence-driven deformable registration framework that explicitly learns latent-grounded 2D-3D landmark correspondences as an interpretable intermediate representation to bridge cross-modal alignment. For rigid registration, Land-Reg embraces a Cross-modal Latent Alignment module to map multi-modal features into a unified latent space. Further, an Uncertainty-enhanced Overlap Landmark Detector with similarity matching is proposed to robustly estimate explicit 2D-3D landmark correspondences. For non-rigid registration, we design a novel shape-constrained supervision strategy that anchors shape deformation to matched landmarks through reprojection consistency and incorporates local-isometric regularization to alleviate inherent 2D-3D depth ambiguity, while a rendered-mask alignment enforces global shape consistency. Experimental results on the P2ILF dataset demonstrate the superiority of our method on both rigid pose estimation and non-rigid deformation. Our code will be available at https://github.com/cuiruize/Land-Reg.
tldr: The paper introduces Land-Reg, a novel framework for laparoscopic liver surgery that uses latent-grounded 2D-3D landmark correspondences to improve preoperative-to-intraoperative liver registration, demonstrating superior performance on the P2ILF dataset.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为Land-Reg的新框架，用于腹腔镜肝脏手术，它使用潜在的2D-3D地标对应来改善术前到术中的肝脏配准，并在P2ILF数据集上表现出优越的性能。
summary_zh: 在腹腔镜肝脏手术中，增强现实技术通过将术前CT/MRI获得的3D肝脏模型叠加到腹腔镜2D视图上，增强术中解剖引导。然而，现有的配准方法缺乏对由潜在证据支持的可靠2D-3D几何对应关系的显式建模，导致临床场景中可解释性有限，并可能导致不稳定的对齐。在这项工作中，我们引入了 Land-Reg，一种对应关系驱动的可变形配准框架，它显式地学习以潜在空间为基础的2D-3D地标对应关系，作为一种可解释的中间表示，以桥接跨模态对齐。对于刚性配准，Land-Reg 采用了一种跨模态潜在对齐模块，将多模态特征映射到一个统一的潜在空间。此外，我们提出了一种不确定性增强的重叠地标检测器，通过相似性匹配来稳健地估计显式的2D-3D地标对应关系。对于非刚性配准，我们设计了一种新颖的形状约束监督策略，通过重投影一致性将形状变形锚定到匹配的地标上，并结合局部等距正则化来缓解固有的2D-3D深度模糊性，同时使用渲染掩码对齐来加强全局形状一致性。在P2ILF数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的方法在刚性姿态估计和非刚性变形方面都具有优越性。我们的代码将在https://github.com/cuiruize/Land-Reg 上提供。

title: PPEDCRF: Privacy-Preserving Enhanced Dynamic CRF for Location-Privacy Protection for Sequence Videos with Minimal Detection Degradation
summary: Dashcam videos collected by autonomous or assisted-driving systems are increasingly shared for safety auditing and model improvement. Even when explicit GPS metadata are removed, an attacker can still infer the recording location by matching background visual cues (e.g., buildings and road layouts) against large-scale street-view imagery. This paper studies location-privacy leakage under a background-based retrieval attacker, and proposes PPEDCRF, a privacy-preserving enhanced dynamic conditional random field framework that injects calibrated perturbations only into inferred location-sensitive background regions while preserving foreground detection utility. PPEDCRF consists of three components: (i) a dynamic CRF that enforces temporal consistency to discover and track location sensitive regions across frames, (ii) a normalized control penalty (NCP) that allocates perturbation strength according to a hierarchical sensitivity model, and (iii) a utility-preserving noise injection module that minimizes interference to object detection and segmentation. Experiments on public driving datasets demonstrate that PPEDCRF significantly reduces location-retrieval attack success (e.g., Top-k retrieval accuracy) while maintaining competitive detection performance (e.g., mAP and segmentation metrics) compared with common baselines such as global noise, white-noise masking, and feature-based anonymization. The source code is in https://github.com/mabo1215/PPEDCRF.git
tldr: The paper proposes PPEDCRF, a privacy-preserving framework using dynamic conditional random fields and calibrated perturbations to protect location privacy in dashcam videos while maintaining object detection accuracy, addressing location-inference-based attacks.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了PPEDCRF，一个隐私保护框架，使用动态条件随机场和校准扰动来保护行车记录仪视频中的位置隐私，同时保持目标检测的准确性，解决基于位置推断的攻击。
summary_zh: 由自动驾驶或辅助驾驶系统收集的行车记录仪视频正被越来越多地用于安全审计和模型改进。即使显式的GPS元数据被删除，攻击者仍可以通过将背景视觉线索（例如，建筑物和道路布局）与大规模街景图像进行匹配来推断记录位置。本文研究了在基于背景检索攻击下的位置隐私泄露问题，并提出了一种隐私保护增强动态条件随机场框架PPEDCRF，该框架仅将经过校准的扰动注入到推断出的位置敏感背景区域，同时保留前景检测的效用。PPEDCRF由三个组件组成：（i）一个动态CRF，它强制执行时间一致性以发现和跟踪跨帧的位置敏感区域，（ii）一个归一化控制惩罚（NCP），它根据分层敏感度模型分配扰动强度，以及（iii）一个效用保持型噪声注入模块，该模块最大限度地减少对目标检测和分割的干扰。在公开驾驶数据集上的实验表明，与全局噪声、白噪声掩蔽和基于特征的匿名化等常见基线相比，PPEDCRF显著降低了位置检索攻击的成功率（例如，Top-k检索准确率），同时保持了具有竞争力的检测性能（例如，mAP和分割指标）。源代码位于https://github.com/mabo1215/PPEDCRF.git。

title: TopoMaskV3: 3D Mask Head with Dense Offset and Height Predictions for Road Topology Understanding
summary: Mask-based paradigms for road topology understanding, such as TopoMaskV2, offer a complementary alternative to query-based methods by generating centerlines via a dense rasterized intermediate representation. However, prior work was limited to 2D predictions and suffered from severe discretization artifacts, necessitating fusion with parametric heads. We introduce TopoMaskV3, which advances this pipeline into a robust, standalone 3D predictor via two novel dense prediction heads: a dense offset field for sub-grid discretization correction within the existing BEV resolution, and a dense height map for direct 3D estimation. Beyond the architecture, we are the first to address geographic data leakage in road topology evaluation by introducing (1) geographically distinct splits to prevent memorization and ensure fair generalization, and (2) a long-range (+/-100 m) benchmark. TopoMaskV3 achieves state-of-the-art 28.5 OLS on this geographically disjoint benchmark, surpassing all prior methods. Our analysis shows that the mask representation is more robust to geographic overfitting than Bezier, while LiDAR fusion is most beneficial at long range and exhibits larger relative gains on the overlapping original split, suggesting overlap-induced memorization effects.
tldr: TopoMaskV3 introduces a 3D mask-based approach for road topology understanding with dense offset and height predictions, addressing geographic data leakage in evaluation with a geographically disjoint benchmark and achieving state-of-the-art results.
tldr_zh: TopoMaskV3 提出了一种基于 3D 掩码的道路拓扑理解方法，通过密集的偏移和高度预测，并引入地理上分离的基准来解决评估中的地理数据泄露问题，实现了最先进的结果。
summary_zh: 基于掩码的道路拓扑理解范式，例如 TopoMaskV2，通过生成基于密集栅格化中间表示的中心线，为基于查询的方法提供了一种互补的替代方案。然而，先前的工作仅限于 2D 预测，并遭受了严重的离散化伪影，因此需要与参数化头部进行融合。我们引入了 TopoMaskV3，通过两种新的密集预测头部，将此流程推进为鲁棒的、独立的 3D 预测器：一个用于在现有 BEV 分辨率内进行亚网格离散化校正的密集偏移场，以及一个用于直接 3D 估计的密集高度图。除了架构之外，我们首次通过引入 (1) 地理上不同的分割，以防止记忆并确保公平泛化，以及 (2) 远距离 (+/-100 m) 基准，来解决道路拓扑评估中的地理数据泄露问题。TopoMaskV3 在这个地理上不相交的基准上实现了最先进的 28.5 OLS，超越了所有先前的方法。我们的分析表明，掩码表示比贝塞尔曲线更能抵抗地理过拟合，而激光雷达融合在远距离处最有益，并且在重叠的原始分割上表现出更大的相对增益，表明存在重叠诱导的记忆效应。

title: Security Risks in Machining Process Monitoring: Sequence-to-Sequence Learning for Reconstruction of CNC Axis Positions
summary: Accelerometer-based process monitoring is widely deployed in modern machining systems. When mounted on moving machine components, such sensors implicitly capture kinematic information related to machine motion and tool trajectories. If this information can be reconstructed, condition monitoring data constitutes a severe security threat, particularly for retrofitted or weakly protected sensor systems. Classical signal processing approaches are infeasible for position reconstruction from broadband accelerometer signals due to sensor- and process-specific non-idealities, like noise or sensor placement effects. In this work, we demonstrate that sequence-to-sequence machine learning models can overcome these non-idealities and enable reconstruction of CNC axis and tool positions. Our approach employs LSTM-based sequence-to-sequence models and is evaluated on an industrial milling dataset. We show that learning-based models reduce the reconstruction error by up to 98% for low complexity motion profiles and by up to 85% for complex machining sequences compared to double integration. Furthermore, key geometric characteristics of tool trajectories and workpiece-related motion features are preserved. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study demonstrating learning-based CNC position reconstruction from industrial condition monitoring accelerometer data.
tldr: This paper demonstrates that sequence-to-sequence learning models can reconstruct CNC axis positions from accelerometer data, highlighting a potential security risk in machining process monitoring. The method significantly reduces reconstruction error compared to traditional approaches.
tldr_zh: 本文证明了序列到序列的学习模型可以从加速度计数据中重建数控轴的位置，强调了加工过程监控中潜在的安全风险。与传统方法相比，该方法显着降低了重建误差。
summary_zh: 基于加速度计的过程监控在现代加工系统中得到广泛应用。当安装在移动的机器部件上时，这些传感器隐式地捕获与机器运动和刀具轨迹相关的运动学信息。如果能够重构这些信息，状态监测数据将构成严重的安全威胁，特别是对于改造过的或保护薄弱的传感器系统。由于传感器和过程相关的非理想性（如噪声或传感器位置效应），经典的信号处理方法在从宽带加速度计信号中进行位置重构时不可行。在这项工作中，我们展示了序列到序列的机器学习模型可以克服这些非理想性，并实现 CNC 轴和刀具位置的重构。我们的方法采用基于 LSTM 的序列到序列模型，并在工业铣削数据集上进行评估。我们表明，与双重积分相比，基于学习的模型可以将低复杂度运动轮廓的重构误差降低高达 98%，将复杂加工序列的重构误差降低高达 85%。此外，刀具轨迹的关键几何特征和与工件相关的运动特征得以保留。据我们所知，这是第一个展示从工业状态监测加速度计数据中进行基于学习的 CNC 位置重构的研究。

title: Randomized Kiring Believer for Parallel Bayesian Optimization with Regret Bounds
summary: We consider an optimization problem of an expensive-to-evaluate black-box function, in which we can obtain noisy function values in parallel. For this problem, parallel Bayesian optimization (PBO) is a promising approach, which aims to optimize with fewer function evaluations by selecting a diverse input set for parallel evaluation. However, existing PBO methods suffer from poor practical performance or lack theoretical guarantees. In this study, we propose a PBO method, called randomized kriging believer (KB), based on a well-known KB heuristic and inheriting the advantages of the original KB: low computational complexity, a simple implementation, versatility across various BO methods, and applicability to asynchronous parallelization. Furthermore, we show that our randomized KB achieves Bayesian expected regret guarantees. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method through experiments on synthetic and benchmark functions and emulators of real-world data.
tldr: This paper introduces a parallel Bayesian optimization (PBO) method called randomized kriging believer (KB) and provides regret guarantees, aiming to improve performance and theoretical soundness in optimizing expensive black-box functions.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种并行贝叶斯优化(PBO)方法，称为随机克里金信徒(KB)，并提供了后悔界限，旨在提高优化昂贵的黑盒函数的性能和理论严谨性。
summary_zh: 我们考虑一个昂贵且难以评估的黑盒函数的优化问题，在这个问题中，我们可以并行获得含噪声的函数值。对于这个问题，并行贝叶斯优化（PBO）是一种很有前景的方法，它旨在通过选择一个多样化的输入集合进行并行评估，从而以更少的函数评估次数进行优化。然而，现有的PBO方法存在实际性能较差或缺乏理论保证的问题。在本研究中，我们提出了一种PBO方法，称为随机克里金信徒（KB），它基于一种广为人知的KB启发式算法，并继承了原始KB的优点：计算复杂度低、易于实现、适用于各种BO方法以及可应用于异步并行化。此外，我们证明了我们的随机KB实现了贝叶斯期望遗憾保证。我们通过在合成函数和基准函数以及真实世界数据的模拟器上的实验，证明了所提出方法的有效性。

title: From GEV to ResLogit: Spatially Correlated Discrete Choice Models for Pedestrian Movement Prediction
summary: High frequency pedestrian motion forecasting when interacting with autonomous vehicles (AVs) can be enhanced through the use of behavioural frameworks, such as discrete choice models, that can explicitly account for correlation among similar movement alternatives. We formulate the pedestrian next step choice as a spatial discrete choice defined by a grid of speed adjustment and heading change. Using naturalistic pedestrian-AV encounters from nuScenes and Argoverse 2 (1 sec decision interval), we estimate a multinomial logit baseline and four spatial generalized extreme value (GEV) specifications (SCL, GSCL, SCNL, and GSCNL). We then compare them to a residual neural network logit (ResLogit) model that learns cross alternative effects while retaining an interpretable linear utility component. Across the evaluated data, spatial GEV structures yield only marginal improvements over multinomial logit, whereas ResLogit achieves a substantially better fit and produces behaviourally coherent errors concentrated among neighbouring grid cells. The results suggest that in dense, high frequency spatial choice sets, learning based residual corrections can capture proximity induced correlation more effectively than analyst specified GEV nesting structures, while maintaining interpretability.
tldr: The paper compares spatial GEV and residual neural network logit (ResLogit) models for pedestrian movement prediction, finding that ResLogit outperforms spatial GEV structures in capturing proximity-induced correlation in dense, high-frequency spatial choice sets while maintaining interpretability.
tldr_zh: 该论文比较了空间GEV和残差神经网络logit（ResLogit）模型在行人运动预测方面的表现，发现ResLogit在捕捉密集、高频空间选择中的邻近诱导相关性方面优于空间GEV结构，同时保持了可解释性。
summary_zh: 在与自动驾驶汽车（AVs）交互时，通过使用行为框架（例如离散选择模型）可以增强行人高频运动预测，这些框架能够明确考虑相似运动备选项之间的相关性。我们将行人下一步选择建模为空间离散选择，通过对速度调整和航向变化的网格进行定义。利用来自nuScenes和Argoverse 2的自然行人-AV交互数据（1秒决策间隔），我们估计了一个多项Logit基线和四个空间广义极值（GEV）规范（SCL、GSCL、SCNL和GSCNL）。然后，我们将它们与残差神经网络Logit（ResLogit）模型进行比较，后者在保留可解释的线性效用分量的同时学习跨备选项效应。在评估的数据中，空间GEV结构仅比多项Logit产生边际改进，而ResLogit实现了显著更好的拟合效果，并产生了行为一致的误差，这些误差集中在相邻的网格单元中。结果表明，在密集、高频的空间选择集中，基于学习的残差校正能够比分析师指定的GEV嵌套结构更有效地捕捉邻近性引起的关联性，同时保持可解释性。
